architecture:
SalesGRU(
  (input_proj): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=13, out_features=232, bias=True)
    (1): GELU(approximate='none')
    (2): LayerNorm((232,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
  )
  (gru): GRU(232, 232, batch_first=True)

    (norm): LayerNorm((232,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    (res): ResidualForecastHead(
